violations.text: Allergen advisory statement was not present on menus. Allergen advisory statement is required to inform customers of their obligation to inform staff of any food allergies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025

Lentil soup was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Prep unit that food was stored in was 34 degrees Fahrenheit and all other foods were 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Soup is also a commercially processed product that is heated to order. Per cook, soup was not removed from unit since opening. Lentil soup was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged fish (salmon and mahi-mahi) were observed at 45 and 28 degrees Fahrenheit with the packaging intact. Salmon was voluntarily disposed of and mahi-mahi was removed from package during time of inspection. Vacuum packaged seafood must be removed from packaging prior to thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine and quaternary ammonium sanitizing solutions for the dish machines and 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
Several ceiling tiles above kitchen dish machine are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2025
